problem: What encryption survives quantum computer attacks — post-quantum cryptography
hypothesis: Federated learning without data centralization may resolve What encryption survives quantum computer attacks — post-quantum cryptography by activating at the systems level.

experiment.protocol: Security audit with 5 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The impediment to action advances action. What stands in the way becomes the way. — Marcus Aurelius
